
> gw-jest-fixture@1.0.0 test
> jest

    ✓ adds (1 ms)
    ✓ subtracts
    ✕ multiplies broken (1 ms)

    ✓ concat
    ✕ uppercase broken (1 ms)

  ● math › multiplies broken

    expect(received).toBe(expected) // Object.is equality

    Expected: 7
    Received: 6

      2 |   test('adds', () => { expect(1 + 1).toBe(2); });
      3 |   test('subtracts', () => { expect(3 - 1).toBe(2); });
    > 4 |   test('multiplies broken', () => { expect(2 * 3).toBe(7); });
        |                                                   ^
      5 | });
      6 | describe('strings', () => {
      7 |   test('concat', () => { expect('a' + 'b').toBe('ab'); });

      at Object.toBe (math.test.js:4:51)

  ● strings › uppercase broken

    expect(received).toBe(expected) // Object.is equality

    Expected: "XYZ"
    Received: "ABC"

       6 | describe('strings', () => {
       7 |   test('concat', () => { expect('a' + 'b').toBe('ab'); });
    >  8 |   test('uppercase broken', () => { expect('abc'.toUpperCase()).toBe('XYZ'); });
         |                                                                ^
       9 | });

      at Object.toBe (math.test.js:8:64)
